nodes.label: AI as accessible knowledge tool for general technical questions
nodes.label_negative: AI as inappropriate for company-specific private tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Ai is so easy to access, if i feel its not a question that only my company would know I would try to use Ai first

nodes.label: AI as direct answer provider for well-known information
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary for tasks requiring company-specific knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: Ai is pretty good at clear answers when it comes to my work specialty. Its pretty well known (within an internet search) information that I am typically seeking

nodes.label: AI as independent personal tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as formally adopted workplace tool

nodes.label: AI as information provider for physical production work
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for hands-on production
nodes.grounding_span: Ai is great with information on metals, but could not take over as my work is production that is not online based

nodes.label: Efficiency and quick access to information
nodes.grounding_span: Ai is so easy to access

nodes.label: Privacy and confidentiality
nodes.grounding_span: I feel that could be a breach of privacy between myself and the company I work for

nodes.label: Job security and irreplaceability of physical work
nodes.grounding_span: could not take over as my work is production that is not online based

nodes.label: Positive satisfaction with AI for clear technical answers
nodes.grounding_span: Ai is pretty good at clear answers when it comes to my work specialty

nodes.label: Cautious avoidance of AI for private company matters
nodes.grounding_span: Specific private tasks about what is done day to day at my company is not used with Ai

nodes.label: Independent adoption stance
nodes.grounding_span: At this time I imagine it will be just used independently

nodes.label: Task-boundary reasoning — clear distinction between general and private knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: if i feel its not a question that only my company would know I would try to use Ai first

nodes.label: Direct question-and-answer pattern — single query then move on
nodes.grounding_span: I find myself only asking a direct question to get the answer I need then moving on with my day
